message:
fix(listener): replace noop waker busy-loop with thread-parking waker

spawn_connection was using Waker::noop() with thread::yield_now(),
causing CPU spinning. Now uses a proper ThreadWaker that parks/unparks
the thread via std::task::Wake, so the thread sleeps when pending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
